title: pelargonium × zichyanum
intro: Pelargonium × zichyanum, also known as Zhiqin's rose, is a hybrid species of the Pelargonium genus, a group of flowering plants native to South Africa. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs, colds, and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory compounds. The health benefits of Zhiqin's rose include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × zichyanum can be found in teas, tinctures, and infusions, often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
